spoilers.title: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1176 SPOILER ⚠️ Dorry and Brogy regain some control over their bodies and prepare to ⚔️ each other. They say goodbye and strike each other’s heads. But their bodies flip back (like when Im
spoilers.text: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1176 SPOILER ⚠️ Dorry and Brogy regain some control over their bodies and prepare to ⚔️ each other. They say goodbye and strike each other’s heads. But their bodies flip back (like when Imu used Domi Reversi, but in reverse). They're now back to their normal selves and are now fully recovered. ✨ In the final double-page spread of the chapter, Zoro, Dorry, Brogy, Hajrudin, and Stansen stand together, grinning 😏 and ready to fight the other Domi Reversi-ed giants. 💪 -------------------------------------- HOLY PEAK!!! 🗻 More counterattacks are coming in the next chapters!!! 🔥

items.text: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1176 SPOILER ⚠️ Dorry and Brogy regain some control over their bodies and prepare to ⚔️ each other. They say goodbye and strike each other’s heads. But their bodies flip back (like when Imu used Domi Reversi, but in reverse). They're now back to their normal selves and are now fully recovered. ✨ In the final double-page spread of the chapter, Zoro, Dorry, Brogy, Hajrudin, and Stansen stand together, grinning 😏 and ready to fight the other Domi Reversi-ed giants. 💪 -------------------------------------- HOLY PEAK!!! 🗻 More counterattacks are coming in the next chapters!!! 🔥
